pipeline.response: In the 2020 elections, John Dramani Mahama of the NDC received 181,021 votes, which accounted for 62.53% of the votes in the Oti region. Nana Akufo-Addo of the NPP received 103,865 votes (35.88%), while other candidates received significantly fewer votes [large_csv_2020_oti_region_001].
